_meta.methodology: Expert-defined initial assurance weights for MVP. Weights reflect relative evidence reliability: DPR (35%) and Satellite (30%) are the primary independent evidence streams; they provide documentary and physical ground-truth respectively. Cross-evidence synthesis (20%) amplifies convergent signals across streams. Forensics (10%) is a supporting signal — strong when present, absent when no image submitted. PPE (5%) is a site-safety signal that contextualises execution quality. These weights are configurable and intended to evolve through empirical calibration as more assurance cycles accumulate.
_meta.description: Unified risk aggregation component weights and score band definitions. All weights must sum to 1.0 (validated at startup).
